'''Uta''' was a [[Hutt/Legends|Hutt]] artifact [[Smuggler/Legends|smuggler]] who smuggled military artifacts and sold them for a high profit. He was arrested on that charge later on. His fate after his arrest is unknown.

==Appearances==
*''[[Before the Storm]]'' {{1stm}}
